title: lannea rubra
intro: Lannea rubra, also known as the Red Currant Tree, is a species of tree in the Anacardiaceae family native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects, making it useful in treating a variety of health issues. Lannea rubra has been shown to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds and skin conditions, and providing antioxidant properties to protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential as a natural remedy.
